title: Gilt yields ease as UK PM Starmer says 'tough' election results won't make him quit
summary_full: The U.K. is counting votes after an election of local councilors and devolved governments on Thursday.
summary_public: The U.K. is counting votes after an election of local councilors and devolved governments on Thursday.

GB.evidence: Gilt yields ease as UK PM Starmer says 'tough' election results
